examples: Inside lay the great stone coffin, enclosing three chests of gilded wood.
It is a spacious apartment, with gilded pillars and pilasters, and pictured walls and ceilings.
Since music was widely esteemed during the Gilded Age, it follows that it is viewed more negatively, or disregarded, during the current era.
An evening here will bring you right back to that gilded age of movie going.
There is an elaborate gilded monument to the estimated 14, 000 victims in the nearby village of Stryzhavka.
